notableEvents.label: Carlos Correa GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Correa grounds into a double play, third baseman Max Muncy to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Yordan Alvarez to 3rd. Jose Altuve out at 2nd. Carlos Correa out at 1st.
